3014960.name: Skallig
3014960.description:
Become a Son of the Corporation

Come back to life as the slave Employee P-151889 and delve into the horrors of Utgard, a sealed-off city-state ruled by a cruel corporatocracy. Uncover the atrocities that keep it running, experience its oppressive atmosphere, solve intricate puzzles, and face terrifying creatures as you explore a society consumed by work in a classic psychological horror adventure with an officepunk aesthetic.
3014960.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
